facebook.caption: 4.5 stars at Vinpearl Land Phú Quốc. 148 reviews deep and still delivering. Bãi Dài is already one of Phu Quoc's longest stretches of beach, and this resort sits right on it. Private beach access, full resort amenities, the kind of property that justifies a longer stay. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Walking into Vinpearl Land Phú Quốc on Bãi Dài, and the beach is right there. 4.5 stars across 148 reviews. This is what a Phu Quoc resort day actually looks like.
